Event: Mermaid Adventure
Event Date: 11/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: CB40
Pearl Hunter Crossbow

When attacking, has a 36% chance of dealing 185% damage in 2 seconds.

Once in a while the unit fires electric arrows at 3 random enemies. They deal 700000 magic damage on impact and apply an electric pulse to the targets for 3 sec. Whenever a unit affected by the electric pulse uses an ability, they are struck by a lightning discharge that deals 400000 magic damage to that unit and all enemies in a small radius around them. All affected units are also stunned for 2 sec. Additionally, the main target of the ability has their physical and magic armor reduced by 30% for 4 sec and takes 650000 magic damage for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Sage bot code: CB40

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
